name: Comparative Analysis of GAT and BERT for Human-Like Playtesting

description: arXiv:2607.11501v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurately modeling and understanding player experience is crucial for designing engaging puzzle games. To achieve this, a common approach involves collecting diverse user data to train predictive playtesting models that mimic player behavior. However, existing data-driven methods often lack the ability to capture the full range of player strategi...
author: Kleio Fragkedaki, Theodoros Panagiotakopoulos, Matteo Biasielli, Hui Wang
